PropertySetConfig.label: TextBlock1
PropertySetConfig.text:
Please have the following information, abilities, and materials available to complete the full application:

  1. Complete the Liquor Retail License Application form
  2. Submit a Completed Wholesaler Affidavit of Compliance form (Transfer Applicants Only) - form is here
  3. Pay the application fees - View application fees here (you will have the ability to pay the fees in this application) 
  4. Submit a diagram of the Premises
    • Dimensions included, Exterior areas should show type of control (fences, walls, entry/exit points etc.) and a seprate diagram for each floor.
  5. Proof of Property Possession (Deed in name of applicat)
  6. Background Information and Financial Documents
    • Individual History Record(s) Form DR 84041-1  for each individual/principal of the establishment
    • Fingerprints taken and submitted to the appropriate Local Licensing Authority.  Vendors includes the following:
      • IdentoGO – https://uenroll.identogo.com/
        • Phone: (844) 539-5539 (toll-free)
      • State Fingerprinting – http://www.statefingerprinting.com

Please complete the application and provide and upload the additional information through this portal as it becomes available through this portal.  The Application will not be processed until all the information is provided and the application fees are paid.

Press Next to Continue:
